inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $783.8M less capital spending $69.1M ÷ 86.6M diluted shares per ALLE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001579241_26_000007.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; acquisition-related outflows and working-capital swings treated as non-recurring in growth judgment.

bear.notes: Non-residential construction slowdown; EMEA margin pressure; multiple compression

base.notes: Americas mechanical strength; electronic mix shift; stable pricing

bull.notes: Electronic/software acceleration; M&A synergies; margin expansion

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light security products; goodwill from tuck-in M&A is separate (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $36M; electronic/software subscriptions convert over time

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Electronic products $278M FY2025; separate electronic_access_and_software_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Americas mechanical and specification-grade security products grow with non-residential construction and retrofit; electronic access mix shift and price increases partially offset EMEA margin pressure and import competition
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Americas segment revenue growth falls below 2% for four consecutive quarters
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Electronic products revenue grows above 15% with stable Americas margins

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map security-products owner cash, electronic/software option, net financial claims, and housing-cycle reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALLE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001579241_26_000007.htm: FY2025 revenue $4067.3M, OCF $783.8M, FCF $714.7M, cash $356.2M, total debt $1980.1M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade as non-residential construction normalizes.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Industrial compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 18× / 22× / 26× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

components.label: Electronic access and software monetization option

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALLE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001579241_26_000007.htm: FY2025 revenue $4067.3M, OCF $783.8M, FCF $714.7M, cash $356.2M, total debt $1980.1M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 electronic products and software revenue

source.locator: Electronic products revenue $278.3M FY2025 (product category note)

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted electronic access and software monetization upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on electronic/software mix shift and recurring access-control subscriptions beyond normalized mechanical owner-cash path.

calculations.label: Electronic access and software option per share

inputs.label: Revolving credit facility outstanding at year-end

source.locator: DebtInstrumentCarryingAmount $190.6M on Revolving Facility at December 31, 2025

assumptions.label: Housing-cycle, price competition, and variable-rate debt reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for non-residential construction slowdown, low-cost import competition, and revolver/variable-rate exposure.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ALLE, including security-products owner cash, electronic/software option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated security-products engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; electronic option, net liquidity, and cycle reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity; economic value in normalized owner cash ($8.2529/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Security products owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Normalized free cash flow from Americas and International segments
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Acquisition outflows treated as non-recurring in growth judgment.

component_groups.label: Electronic access and software monetization option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental value from electronic/software mix shift
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on access-control subscriptions.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; $278M electronic revenue FY2025.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~30% that electronic mix delivers planned margin lift; low zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Mix shift over 3–5 years per FY2025 10-K product strategy.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: R&D and capex funded from operating cash.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after total debt and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less debt.

component_groups.label: Housing-cycle, competition, and variable-rate debt reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Non-residential construction and import competition stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Revolver draw $190.6M and variable-rate exposure cap partial dhando.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Security products owner-cash engine (Americas + International)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
